nav.footer_msg: Building a better Nepal through verified civic action.

home.hero_title: Build a better Nepal through service
home.hero_subtitle: Connect with local community events, track your impact, and volunteer for causes that matter. Verified actions, real community outcomes.

admin.oversight_subtitle: Review community partnerships, verify organizations, and manage system integrity.
admin.track_growth_desc: Track growth, events, and volunteer impact.

admin.recent_events_desc: This page is read-only by design, giving admins a clean operational overview without disturbing existing workflows.

admin.users_across_roles: Users across volunteers, organizations, and admins
admin.track_org_approvals: Track organization approvals, rejections, and moderation actions.

about.hero_title: Built to turn local service into visible civic impact
about.hero_subtitle: Smart Community helps volunteers, organizations, and administrators coordinate trusted community action across Nepal.
about.mission_body: Make local volunteering easy to discover, verify, and celebrate.
about.vision_body: Connect real community needs to verified organizations and volunteers.
about.approach_body: Combine transparent workflows, analytics, and identity to build trust.
about.for_title: A platform designed for accountability, visibility, and momentum
about.for_desc: The product brings together discovery, approval workflows, volunteer reputation, and impact tracking.

leaderboard.hero_subtitle: Celebrating the people driving the biggest community outcomes.
leaderboard.load_error: Unable to load the community leaderboard.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Personalize your Smart Community experience, update security preferences, and manage your public profile.

auth.welcome_subtitle: Jump into local events, track your impact, and help your community thrive. Join hundreds of volunteers building a stronger Nepal.
auth.otp_desc: We've sent a 6-digit code to your email. Please enter it to complete your secure sign-in.
auth.join_community_desc: Join a community of active volunteers building a stronger Nepal through verified action and smart matching.
auth.terms_agree: By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.org_infra_desc: Smart Community provides the infrastructure for organizations to manage volunteers, verify hours, and demonstrate verified social impact to the world.
auth.org_reg_restricted: Organization self-registration is restricted. Please contact support.
auth.org_verification_desc: Registering as an organization involves a verification process and admin approval.
auth.verifying_email_subtitle: Please wait while we confirm your account.

contact.title: Talk to the team behind Smart Community
contact.subtitle: Use this space for partnership requests, platform support, or product feedback.
contact.section_subtitle: Tell us what is blocking your team, where volunteers need support, or what would make the platform more useful.
contact.support_note: Email support for verification, onboarding, event publishing, and product feedback.
contact.form_subtitle: A clean, low-friction contact flow that fits the current product language.
contact.success: Thanks - your message is ready to be sent to the support team.
